- **frame_ms ↔ stream_unload_ms** (r=0.230, n=4981): Hitch-Frames: stream_unload_ms-Mittel 0.030 vs. übrige 0.014 (Faktor 2.19). Pearson r=0.230 (schwach).

- **frame_ms ↔ pending_unload_count** (r=0.045, n=4981): Hitch-Frames: pending_unload_count-Mittel 0.070 vs. übrige 0.000 (Faktor inf). Pearson r=0.045 (vernachlässigbar).
- **frame_ms ↔ deco_extract_ms** (r=0.720, n=4981): Hitch-Frames: deco_extract_ms-Mittel 0.963 vs. übrige 0.488 (Faktor 1.98). Pearson r=0.720 (stark).
- **frame_ms ↔ tile_extract_ms** (r=-0.231, n=4981): Hitch-Frames: tile_extract_ms-Mittel 0.105 vs. übrige 0.240 (Faktor 0.44). Pearson r=-0.231 (schwach).
